meaning: <日>n.糯米团(用糯米粉做的糕团)[日文汉字:饼]
examples: Hence his nickname: “Mochi”, or “cobbler” in Hindi.
It's actually Mizu Shingen Mochi, a new Japanese rice cake that certainly tricks our eyes but is supposedly delicious.
Like the mochi in your bowl sticking to everything, this macho singing group has latched onto every branch of the pop-culture tree.
"Google is helping to validate the space, " says Jameson Hsu, chief executive of in-game ad network Mochi Media.
Mochi Ads aren't the sole source of revenue even for casual game developers.
